## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Section is written per the SRS template
- [ ] Each requirement has a unique ID (FR-XXX or NFR-XXX)
- [ ] Requirements are traceable to BRD
- [ ] NFRs include measurable thresholds
- [ ] Peer reviewed
- [ ] BA Lead approved
